opportunity.title: Show HN: Output.ai - OSS framework we extracted from 500+ production AI agents
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: You'll want to watch out for token drift across providers - what works at 500 request samples often breaks at scale. The hardest part isn't the routing logic itself, but building reliable failure recovery when models silently degrade under load. Production systems need circuit breakers that respect token budgets, not just rate limits.
actions.reasoning: I have extensive hands-on experience building multi-provider AI agent systems, multi-agent orchestration, and production-grade cognitive architectures including tool routing, fallback strategies, and reliability patterns.
